assertions.description: The ft2232h-ice40 schematic connects an FT2232H USB bridge to an iCE40 FPGA via nets SCK, MOSI, MISO (plus /CS). net_classification correctly identifies SCK as 'clock' and MOSI/MISO as 'data'. However, bus_analysis.spi is empty — no SPI bus was detected. This is a missed detection: the analyzer has the right net-type classifications but does not assemble them into an SPI bus instance when the devices involved are not standard SPI controller/peripheral library entries.
